/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 1.0.0 -current_version 2.1.0 -o libepx_c.2.1.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libepx_c.1.dylib CMakeFiles/epx_c.dir/src/c_api.cpp.o  libepx.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/libsodium/1.0.22/lib/libsodium.dylib
